summary: Catalogue/Flipbook feature testing complete. All backend APIs pass (14/14 tests). Frontend UI verified - catalogues listing page, flipbook viewer with PDF rendering, and admin CMS all working correctly.

elements_verified: Dark hero section with 'Our Catalogues' heading and gold accent
Company Profile category section with icon
Catalogue card for 'LEXA Company Profile 2026' with PDF icon placeholder
Card links open in new tab (target='_blank')
Header with title, category, back link
Catalogues link in admin sidebar with BookOpen icon
Page header 'Catalogues' with 'Manage PDF catalogues and documents'
Table with columns: Title, Category, Status, Pages, Preview, Actions
Test catalogue 'LEXA Company Profile 2026' shown as Published
add_modal_fields: PDF upload area with 'CHOOSE PDF' button (Max 50MB)
Category dropdown (Company Profile, Pre-Qualification, Brand Catalogues)

api_endpoints.GET /api/catalogues: PASS - Returns list of published catalogues

seed_data_creation: Test PDF seeded at /api/uploads/files/catalogues/test_company_profile.pdf with catalogue entry 'lexa-company-profile-2026'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalogue/Flipbook feature is fully functional. The flipbook uses react-pageflip + pdfjs-dist for client-side PDF rendering with page-turn animation. Admin CMS allows full CRUD operations for catalogues with PDF upload. Test PDF is a 4-page ReportLab-generated document.
